best_overall.canonical_product_name: Breville Barista Express Impress Espresso Machine
best_overall.reason: Best overall for a bundled grinder + espresso workflow: integrated burr grinder, assisted tamping, and PID control—matches the launch guide’s ‘espresso + grinder’ intent without buying separately.

best_budget.reason: Best budget option at $549.0 (under $600 ceiling) with 2 reviewer source(s).

best_upgrade.reason: Premium upgrade at $2799.99 (above $2500 floor) with 1 reviewer source(s).

best_for_specific_use_case.use_case: Best semi-automatic (pair with your own grinder)
best_for_specific_use_case.reason: Wirecutter’s top semi-automatic for people who want a separate grinder and more hands-on shot quality.
